Compiler's comment: These data are the cross section
for forming a neutron. Most of the reaction channels
than contribute produce TWO neutrons per reaction:
alpha+alpha+n+n,... The only channel that produces
only one per reaction is 7Li(t,n)9Be(g.s.). So there
is an opportunity for confusion by a factor of 2 here.
